mnemonics.title: Four Types of Analytics - DDPP
mnemonics.content: D - Descriptive (What happened?), D - Diagnostic (Why did it happen?), P - Predictive (What will happen?), P - Prescriptive (What should we do?). Think: 'Double D, Double P' - from past understanding to future action!

mnemonics.title: IoT Analytics Pipeline - GCS-PAV-A
mnemonics.content: G - Generation (devices create data), C - Collection (gather via protocols), S - Storage (databases), P - Processing (batch/stream), A - Analysis (ML/statistics), V - Visualization (dashboards), A - Action (automated decisions). Think: 'GPS PAVA navigates data to action'.

mnemonics.title: 3 V's of Big Data - VVV
mnemonics.content: Volume (how much data - terabytes), Velocity (how fast data arrives - milliseconds), Variety (how many formats - structured/unstructured). Think: 'Very Very Various data' from IoT devices.

mnemonics.title: Edge vs Cloud - LRFC
mnemonics.content: Edge = Low Latency, Reduced bandwidth. Cloud = Full analytics, Complex models. Think: 'Edge is Light and Rapid, Cloud is Full and Capable'.
